description: CI pipeline checks for bootstrap manifest and skill changes

gates.name: skill_hash_integrity
gates.trigger: any change to skills/substrate/ or skills/knowledge/
gates.check: Recompute sha256 of each SKILL.md, compare to manifest hashes
gates.pass: proceed (or update manifest with new hashes if skill changed intentionally)
gates.fail: BLOCK merge — hash mismatch, possible tampering or unsynced manifest

gates.name: three_axis_completeness
gates.check: Parse YAML frontmatter; verify invariants, bridge_connections, contrast all present and non-empty

gates.name: dependency_acyclicity
gates.check: Build dependency graph from all skill bridges; verify no cycles

gates.name: veto_generator_separation
gates.trigger: any change to substrate or knowledge skills
gates.check: Verify substrate/knowledge skills have no 'generate' or 'hypothesize' in purpose; verify domain skills have 'must_call_veto' in contract

gates.name: adversarial_contradiction
gates.trigger: any change to knowledge skills (know-physics, know-math, know-language)
gates.check: Run contradiction corpus: inject known-physical-law violations, verify veto catches them
gates.fail: BLOCK merge — veto layer failed adversarial test

gates.name: bootstrap_self_host
gates.trigger: any change to BOOTSTRAP_MANIFEST.json or bootstrap spec
gates.check: Run deterministic self-host test: load manifest on clean node, verify all 9 skills load in order, verify phase gates

gates.name: signature_present
gates.check: Verify at least 1 valid root signature over content_hash
gates.fail: WARN (non-blocking for PR, BLOCKING for merge to main)

gates.name: skill_count_bounds
gates.check: Verify total skills in range [50, 80]; flag if growing beyond threshold
gates.fail: WARN — skill count outside expected bounds, review needed

gates.name: entropy_budget
gates.check: Verify each skill has resource_budget with entropy field; verify entropy_budget is non-increasing across boot phases
gates.fail: WARN — entropy budget missing or increasing

canary_tests.name: fresh_node_boot
canary_tests.desc: Spin clean container, run bootstrap-load, verify 9 skills loaded
canary_tests.pass_criteria: All 8 phases complete, no errors, ledger entry present

canary_tests.name: adversarial_fuzz
canary_tests.desc: Inject contradictory claims, authority spoofs, boundary violations
canary_tests.pass_criteria: Veto catches >= 99%, no unauthorized irreversible actions

canary_tests.name: resource_stress
canary_tests.desc: Load 100 concurrent sessions, verify entropy budgets hold
canary_tests.pass_criteria: No session exceeds entropy budget, no OOM

canary_tests.name: collapse_prevention
canary_tests.desc: Feed multi-hypothesis scenarios, verify superposition-manager prevents premature collapse
